use std::path::PathBuf;
use walkdir::WalkDir;

fn scan_following_links_safe(root: &str) -> Vec<String> {
    let root_path = PathBuf::from(root);
    WalkDir::new(root)
        .follow_links(true)
        .same_file_system(true)
        .max_depth(100)
        .into_iter()
        .filter_entry(|e| {
            e.path().starts_with(&root_path)
        })
        .filter_map(|e| e.ok())
        .map(|e| e.path().to_string_lossy().to_string())
        .collect()
}
